content:
# Transaction Sharing Story
## Description
As a personal finance app user, I want to share my transactions with other users, so that I can manage my finances collaboratively with others.

## Acceptance Criteria

### AC1: Share Single Transaction
- **Given** I am logged in and have at least one transaction
- **When** I select a transaction to share and enter the recipient's username or email
- **Then** The system shares the selected transaction with the recipient
- **And** The recipient receives a notification about the shared transaction

### AC2: Share Multiple Transactions
- **Given** I am logged in and have multiple transactions
- **When** I select multiple transactions to share and enter the recipient's username or email
- **Then** The system shares all selected transactions with the recipient
- **And** The recipient receives a notification about the shared transactions

### AC3: Access Control for Shared Transactions
- **Given** I have shared transactions with another user
- **When** The recipient attempts to access the shared transactions
- **Then** The system grants access to the shared transactions based on the permissions set by me
- **And** The recipient can view the shared transactions according to their permissions

### AC4: Error Handling for Invalid Recipient
- **Given** I attempt to share a transaction with an invalid recipient
- **When** The system checks the recipient's username or email
- **Then** The system displays an error message indicating that the recipient is invalid
- **And** The transaction is not shared

### AC5: Edge Case - Sharing with Multiple Recipients
- **Given** I want to share a transaction with multiple recipients
- **When** I select the transaction and enter the recipients' usernames or emails
- **Then** The system shares the transaction with all selected recipients
- **And** Each recipient receives a notification about the shared transaction

## Relevant docs
Feature spec: [Link to feature specification]

---

# Multi-Account Sharing Story
## Description
As a personal finance app user, I want to share multiple accounts with different permissions, so that I can manage my finances collaboratively with others while controlling access to my accounts.

## Acceptance Criteria

### AC1: Share Multiple Accounts with Read-Only Permission
- **Given** I am logged in and have multiple accounts
- **When** I select multiple accounts to share with read-only permission and enter the recipient's username or email
- **Then** The system shares all selected accounts with the recipient with read-only permission
- **And** The recipient can view the shared accounts but cannot make changes

### AC2: Share Multiple Accounts with Read-Write Permission
- **Given** I am logged in and have multiple accounts
- **When** I select multiple accounts to share with read-write permission and enter the recipient's username or email
- **Then** The system shares all selected accounts with the recipient with read-write permission
- **And** The recipient can view and make changes to the shared accounts

### AC3: Access Control for Shared Accounts
- **Given** I have shared accounts with another user
- **When** The recipient attempts to access the shared accounts
- **Then** The system grants access to the shared accounts based on the permissions set by me
- **And** The recipient can view or make changes to the shared accounts according to their permissions

### AC4: Error Handling for Invalid Account Selection
- **Given** I attempt to share an invalid account
- **When** The system checks the account selection
- **Then** The system displays an error message indicating that the account selection is invalid
- **And** The account is not shared

### AC5: Edge Case - Sharing Accounts with Different Permissions
- **Given** I want to share multiple accounts with different recipients and permissions
- **When** I select the accounts, recipients, and permissions
- **Then** The system shares the accounts with the recipients according to the set permissions
- **And** Each recipient can access the shared accounts according to their granted permissions

## Relevant docs
Feature spec: [Link to feature specification]

---

# Access Control Story
## Description
As a personal finance app user, I want the system to control access to my shared transactions and accounts, so that I can ensure that only authorized users can view or make changes to my financial data.

## Acceptance Criteria

### AC1: Access Control for Shared Transactions
- **Given** I have shared transactions with another user
- **When** The recipient attempts to access the shared transactions
- **Then** The system grants access to the shared transactions based on the permissions set by me
- **And** The recipient can view the shared transactions according to their permissions

### AC2: Access Control for Shared Accounts
- **Given** I have shared accounts with another user
- **When** The recipient attempts to access the shared accounts
- **Then** The system grants access to the shared accounts based on the permissions set by me
- **And** The recipient can view or make changes to the shared accounts according to their permissions

### AC3: Unauthorized Access Attempt
- **Given** An unauthorized user attempts to access my shared transactions or accounts
- **When** The system checks the user's access level
- **Then** The system denies access to the shared transactions or accounts
- **And** The unauthorized user receives an error message indicating that they do not have permission to access the requested data

### AC4: Permission Update
- **Given** I want to update the permissions for a shared transaction or account
- **When** I select the shared transaction or account and update the permissions
- **Then** The system updates the permissions for the shared transaction or account
- **And** The recipient's access to the shared transaction or account is adjusted according to the updated permissions

## Relevant docs
Feature spec: [Link to feature specification]

---

# Error Handling Story
## Description
As a personal finance app user, I want the system to handle errors when sharing transactions or accounts, so that I can understand and recover from any issues that occur during the sharing process.

## Acceptance Criteria

### AC1: Error Handling for Invalid Recipient
- **Given** I attempt to share a transaction or account with an invalid recipient
- **When** The system checks the recipient's username or email
- **Then** The system displays an error message indicating that the recipient is invalid
- **And** The transaction or account is not shared

### AC2: Error Handling for Invalid Account Selection
- **Given** I attempt to share an invalid account
- **When** The system checks the account selection
- **Then** The system displays an error message indicating that the account selection is invalid
- **And** The account is not shared

### AC3: Error Handling for Permission Issues
- **Given** I attempt to share a transaction or account with insufficient permissions
- **When** The system checks my access level
- **Then** The system displays an error message indicating that I do not have permission to share the transaction or account
- **And** The transaction or account is not shared

### AC4: Error Handling for System Errors
- **Given** A system error occurs during the sharing process
- **When** The system detects the error
- **Then** The system displays an error message indicating that an error occurred
- **And** The system logs the error for further investigation

## Relevant docs
Feature spec: [Link to feature specification]

---

# User Notification Story
## Description
As a personal finance app user, I want to receive notifications when someone shares transactions or accounts with me, so that I can stay informed about changes to my financial data.

## Acceptance Criteria

### AC1: Notification for Shared Transactions
- **Given** Someone shares a transaction with me
- **When** The system sends a notification to me
- **Then** I receive a notification indicating that a transaction has been shared with me
- **And** I can view the shared transaction from the notification

### AC2: Notification for Shared Accounts
- **Given** Someone shares an account with me
- **When** The system sends a notification to me
- **Then** I receive a notification indicating that an account has been shared with me
- **And** I can view the shared account from the notification

### AC3: Customizable Notification Settings
- **Given** I want to customize my notification settings
- **When** I access the notification settings
- **Then** I can select which types of notifications I want to receive
- **And** The system updates my notification settings accordingly

## Relevant docs
Feature spec: [Link to feature specification]
